lane.title: 06 Meta Ads
lane.last_task: Create Meta retargeting audiences after Custom Audience Terms acceptance
lane.last_summary: Created four HE website Custom Audiences via Meta access token: HE_DIR_VISIT_7D_20260525=120246563761410505, HE_DIR_VISIT_30D_20260525=120246563767670505, HE_FIND_LOCATION_30D_20260525=120246563775240505, HE_RT_VOUCHER_VISIT_30D_20260525=120246563783970505. Verified first three are delivery-ready; voucher-return pool is created but still too small. Attempted B1 50/75/95 video audiences; Meta rejected video API rule/event schema, so no video audience created.
lane.next_action: Use ready website pools plus existing page-engaged 7D/30D for first WABA voucher retargeting adset. Create B1 50/75/95 video-view audiences through Ads Manager UI or continue API schema discovery before using video-view retargeting.
lane.mutation_status: created four Meta website Custom Audiences only; no campaign, adset, ad, WhatsApp send, or spend mutation

recent_events.task: Implement Meta retargeting audience setup via access token
recent_events.summary: Verified live Meta ad account, pixel, existing audiences, and B1 creative/video via access token. Attempted Custom Audience creation and confirmed hard Meta #2663 Custom Audience Terms blocker. Added executable after-TOS script for 7D/30D directions, FindLocation, and rt_voucher website audiences; no campaign/adset/ad/spend mutation performed.
recent_events.next_action: Owner must accept Custom Audience Terms at https://www.facebook.com/customaudiences/app/tos/?act=634959029638544, then rerun the prepared audience creation script and verify audience IDs before any retargeting adset creation.
recent_events.mutation_status: blocked by Meta Custom Audience Terms; read-only live verification plus local implementation script only

recent_events.task: Plan Meta to WABA voucher retargeting funnel and package creatives
recent_events.summary: Verified current deployed WABA voucher flow from GitHub main whatsapp.js SHA 166b38102d7d42f86baa517211c1f2169a687146: trigger phrase 'Hi Hamza, send my WhatsApp voucher' maps to source meta_rt_voucher, creates/reuses wa_voucher_claims code HE-xxxxx, then routes to Full Menu, Voucher Offers, Open Maps, Combos, Shawarma/Kathi, or Dine-in. Created funnel spec at _context/Meta_WABA_Voucher_Retargeting_2026-05-25/FUNNEL_SPEC.md and Desktop creative pack Hamza_Meta_WABA_Voucher_Final_2026-05-25 with final A voucher-first and B food-first 9:16/4:5 PNGs plus contact sheet. No Meta or WABA send mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Before launch, live-test owner/test-number WABA trigger phrase, verify voucher claim row creation/readout, then create Meta messages campaign HE_RT_WABA_VOUCHER_CLAIM_20260525 using WhatsApp destination and exact prefill text; do not route this campaign to /directions.
recent_events.mutation_status: creative/planning output only; money mutation still blocked until direct Meta campaign creation approval and live WABA test passes
